title: Perrierangraecum liliodorum
taxonomy: Perrierangraecum liliodorum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Perrierangraecum, which is a group of orchids. Perrierangraecum liliodorum is classified under the family Xylobium. However, some sources may group it under the family Gongora.
